decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-sbs is the existing canonical record for B44 Select Bus Service. The observation confirms the same SBS route (Nostrand/Rogers, Brooklyn, SBS variant) and already resolves to route_b44-sbs. No different target record needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited becomes SBS, with fewer stops
B44 SBS will operate northbound on Rogers Ave, B44 local remains on New York Ave

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-local is the existing canonical record for B44 Local service. The observation confirms the same local route (Brooklyn, local variant, remains on New York Ave) and already resolves to route_b44-local. No different target record needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 local remains on New York Ave
Both SBS and local service travels south of Ave U to Emmons Ave

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id route_b44-limited is the existing canonical record for B44 Limited service. The observation confirms the same historical limited-stop variant (being replaced by SBS) and already resolves to route_b44-limited. do_not_merge_pairs confirms B44 Limited is distinct from both B44 SBS and B44 Local.

proposed_relations.description: B44 Limited predecessor replaced by B44 SBS successor per June 2012 CAC5 slides

evidence_refs.source_quote: B44 Limited becomes SBS, with fewer stops
B44 Limited becomes SBS, with fewer stops
